analytics.title: Sales analytics
analytics.subtitle: Operational KPIs for the selected window with top sellers and promotions detail.
analytics.load_error: One or more analytics requests failed.

advisory.title: Marketing advisory
advisory.hint: Run a deterministic facts-backed analysis. Output is read-only.
advisory.empty: No suggestions for the selected parameters.
advisory.fallback_notice_toast: Could not reach the AI model

campaigns.title: Campaign advisor
campaigns.hint: Segment-based campaign ideas from purchase history. Export lists customer IDs in a segment (deterministic bucketing).
campaigns.empty: No campaigns returned for this window.
campaigns.fallback_notice_toast: Could not reach the AI model

charts.top_desc: Quantities sold in the window (top revenue movers).
charts.promo_desc: Discount rule usage in the current snapshot window.

salesRegister.title: Sales invoice register
salesRegister.subtitle: Posted POS invoices by branch and date range.
salesRegister.table_hint: Non-void invoices in the selected range.

inventoryInsights.title: Inventory & promotion insight
inventoryInsights.subtitle: Slow movers, shelf-life risk, and discount performance.
inventoryInsights.slow_hint: Low sell-through versus the configured threshold.
inventoryInsights.alerts_hint: Low cover or expiry within the alert horizon.
inventoryInsights.promo_hint: Rule usage and discount value granted.
